phases.name: XML Output Parity
phases.notes: PoiXmlWriter and XML parity fixtures/tests are present.

phases.name: Minimal xlsx Write
phases.notes: XSSFWorkbook/XSSFSheet/XSSFRow/XSSFCell can write string and numeric cells.

phases.name: xlsx Read
phases.notes: Basic shared string, inline string, and numeric cell read path is present.

phases.name: Styles & Formatting
phases.notes: Initial Phase 2 support for cell styles, fonts, indexed colors, fills, borders, built-in formats, and custom number formats.

classes.notes: Workbook read/write exists; Phase 2 style table APIs are present.
String/numeric values and cell style assignment exist. Formulas remain Phase 5.
Initial Phase 2 subset: font, data format, fill foreground/pattern, and borders.
Initial Phase 2 subset: name, height, indexed color, bold, italic, strikeout, underline.
Built-in formats plus custom formats starting at POI's first user-defined index.
